children.label: sort
description:
Sorts suggestions based on their inferred category and context.
Lower priority number = appears first in list.

functions.label: inlineSuggest
signature: (fullText: string, textBeforeCursor: string, range: { readonly startLineNumber: number; readonly startColumn: number; readonly endLineNumber: number; readonly endColumn: number; } | undefined, callbacks:

children.label: range
signature: { readonly startLineNumber: number; readonly startColumn: number; readonly endLineNumber: number; readonly endColumn: number; } | undefined

functions.label: validateQuery
description:
ES|QL validation public API
It takes a query string and returns a list of messages (errors and warnings) after validate
The astProvider is optional, but if not provided the default one will be used.
This is useful for async loading the ES|QL parser and reduce the bundle size, or to swap grammar version.
As for the callbacks, while optional, the validation function will selectively ignore some errors types based on each callback missing.

children.label: queryString
description: - The query string to validate

children.label: callbacks
description: - Optional callbacks for resource retrieval.

functions.label: withAutoSuggest
description:
Given a suggestion item, decorates it with editor.action.triggerSuggest
that triggers the autocomplete dialog again after accepting the suggestion.

If the suggestion item already has a custom command, it will preserve it, by attaching
the triggerSuggest command as part of a multiCommands execution.

children.label: newColumns
description:
A list of columns names which were newly created by
each command.

children.label: metadataColumns
description:
A list of metadata columns created by the FROM and TS commands
We are separating them here to be able to treat them differently in some contexts

children.label: renamedColumnsPairs
description: A set of renamed columns pairs [oldName, newName]

children.label: grouping
description:
A set of fields used for grouping results in the query.
Note that you don't only get the last grouping applied but all the groupings used in the query.
The client must decide how to use this information.
Example of grouping fields is foo in "STATS AVG(bar) BY foo".

children.label: aggregates
description:
A set of fields used for aggregating results in the query.
Example of aggregate fields is foo in "STATS foo = AVG(bar)".

children.label: constantOnly
description:
If set, this parameter does not accept a field. It only accepts a constant,
though a function can be used to create the value. (e.g. now() for dates or concat() for strings)

children.label: fieldsOnly
description: Default to false. If set to true, this parameter does not accept a function or literal, only fields.

children.label: suggestedValues
description: A list of suggested values for this parameter.

children.label: supportsMultiValues
description:
If true, this parameter supports multiple values (arrays). Default is false.
This indicates that the parameter can accept multiple values, which will be passed as an array.

children.label: hint
description:
Provides information that is useful for getting parameter values from external sources.
For example, an inference endpoint

children.label: location
description: Optional specific location/clause within the command (e.g., 'BY' for STATS BY clause)

children.label: wrongNumberArgsExact
signature: { message: string; type: { fn: string; expected: number; actual: number; }; }

children.label: wrongNumberArgsVariadic
signature: { message: string; type: { fn: string; validArgCounts: number[]; actual: number; }; }

children.label: wrongNumberArgsAtLeast
signature: { message: string; type: { fn: string; minArgs: number; actual: number; }; }

children.label: noMatchingCallSignature
signature: { message: string; type: { functionName: string; argTypes: string; validSignatures: string[]; }; }

children.label: unknownColumn
signature: { message: string; type: { name: string | number; }; }

children.label: unmappedColumnWarning
signature: { message: string; type: { name: string | number; }; }

children.label: invalidInlineCast
signature: { message: string; type: { castType: string; valueType: string; }; }

children.label: functionNotAllowedHere
signature: { message: string; type: { name: string; locationName: string; }; }

children.label: unsupportedColumnTypeForCommand
signature: { message: string; type: { command: string; type: string; givenType: string; column: string; }; }

children.label: wrongOptionArgumentType
signature: { message: string; type: { command: string; option: string; type: string; givenValue: string; }; }

children.label: nestedAggFunction
signature: { message: string; type: { parentName: string; name: string; }; }

children.label: unknownAggregateFunction
signature: { message: string; type: { type: string; value: string; }; }

children.label: unsupportedMode
signature: { message: string; type: { command: string; value: string; expected: string; }; }

children.label: unknownMetadataField
signature: { message: string; type: { value: string; availableFields: string; }; }

children.label: promqlMutuallyExclusiveParams
signature: { message: string; type: { param1: string; param2: string; }; }

children.label: promqlWrongNumberArgs
signature: { message: string; type: { fn: string; expected: string; actual: number; }; }

children.label: promqlNoMatchingSignature
signature: { message: string; type: { fn: string; required: string; }; }

children.label: wrongDissectOptionArgumentType
signature: { message: string; type: { value: string | number; }; }

children.label: licenseRequired
signature: { message: string; type: { name: string; requiredLicense: string; }; }

children.label: licenseRequiredForSignature
signature: { message: string; type: { name: string; signatureDescription: string; requiredLicense: string; }; }

children.label: changePointWrongFieldType
signature: { message: string; type: { columnName: string; givenType: string; }; }

children.label: invalidSettingValue
signature: { message: string; type: { value: string; setting: string; }; }

children.label: invalidMapParameterValueType
signature: { message: string; type: { paramName: string; expectedType: string; actualType: string; }; }

children.label: invalidateColumnsCache
description:
Forces cache invalidation for column metadata.
Only effective when 'getColumnsFor' callback is provided in ESQLCallbacks.
Use when schema changes have occurred (e.g., new fields added to lookup indices).

misc.label: FunctionParameterType
description: This is the type of a parameter in a function definition.

misc.label: FunctionReturnType
description:
This is the return type of a function definition.

TODO: remove `any`

objects.label: dataTypes
description:
This is the list of all data types that are supported in ES|QL.

Not all of these can be used as field types. Some can only be literals,
others may be the value of a field, but cannot be used in the index mapping.

This is a partial list. The full list is here and we may need to expand this type as
the capabilities of the client-side engines grow.
https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/blob/main/x-pack/plugin/esql-core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/esql/core/type/DataType.java

objects.label: ESQL_COMMON_NUMERIC_TYPES
description: Handles numeric types in ES|QL.
